Cheers from Canada

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: What a wonderful connection to Estonia! Tallinn’s Old Town is truly unforgettable, and working on the Botnica must have been quite an experience. The sauna and cold plunge ritual is definitely not for the faint-hearted! 🥶 Thank you for sharing your story, and warm greetings to Canada. What was your favorite memory from the visit?
